items.entry: Act swiftly and without hesitation, for divine will demands resolve.

items.name: Grant Redemption.
items.entry: Show mercy to those who truly seek the light.

subclassFeature.name: Oath of the Seraphim Spells
entries: The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Seraphim Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

subclassFeature.name: Divine Calling
entries: At the start of your turn, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity to take on an angelic form for 1 minute (no action required). While you have this angelic form you begin to glow in radiant light that forms into wings behind you. You gain a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and can hover, and you shed {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} to a range of 20 feet and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for another 20.

When you cast {@spell Divine Smite|XPHB} while in your angelic form, you roll {@dice 1d10} instead of {@dice 1d8} for all the spell's damage dice. For example, a {@spell Divine Smite|XPHB} cast with a 1st-level spell slot deals {@damage 2d10} Radiant damage in your angelic form, while a {@spell Divine Smite|XPHB} cast with a 2nd-level spell slot would deal {@damage 4d10} Radiant damage against an Undead or Fiend. This damage increases to {@dice 1d12} per die at 11th level.

subclassFeature.name: Holy Aura
entries: You know whenever a creature within your {@classFeature Aura of Protection|Paladin|XPHB|6} speaks a lie. Additionally, you and creatures benefiting from your {@classFeature Aura of Protection|Paladin|XPHB|6} gain {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Radiant and Necrotic damage and have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Death Saving Throws|XPHB}.

subclassFeature.name: Angelic Guardian
entries: Once per {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can cast {@spell Summon Celestial|XPHB} without expending a spell slot. When you cast the spell in this way, it lasts for 1 minute and doesn't require {@status Concentration|XPHB}.

subclassFeature.name: Improved Divine Calling
entries: When you use your Divine Calling, your size becomes Large, you gain {@sense Truesight|XPHB} to a range of 30 feet, and your {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} increases to 60 feet.

subclassFeature.name: Blood of the Seraphim
entries: Your Constitution and Charisma ability scores each increase by 4, and your maximum for those ability scores increases by the same amount.

Additionally, when you use Divine Calling, you manifest a radiant bow that you can fire as a {@action Magic|XPHB} action on your turn. Choose a creature you can see within 600 feet. That creature must make a Dexterity saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, if the creature has 100 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer, it dies. Otherwise, it takes {@damage 12d8} Radiant damage.

activation.condition: When you cast an apothecary spell that deals damage, you can expend a Psychic Point to re-roll any number of the dice. You must use the new rolls.
Whenever you take damage, you can use your reaction and expend a Psychic Point, reducing the damage taken by an amount equal to your apothecary level.
When you cast an apothecary spell which does not deal damage, you may spend a Psychic Point to cast it without any somatic or verbal components

Once per turn when a target you can see within 30 feet of you succeeds on an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw against a spell you cast, you can expend a Psychic Point to fill its mind with scrambled psionic energy, forcing it to reroll the {@dice d20} and use the lower roll for its saving throw, possibly turning a success into a failure.

Once per turn, when a target you can see within 30 feet of you, including yourself, fails an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw, you can use a Psychic Point and add your Intelligence modifier to the creature's saving throw, potentially turning the failure into a success.

Whenever you cast a spell that restores hit points to a creature, you may expend a Psychic Point. If you do, all creatures targeted by the spell regain an additional amount of hit points equal to twice your Intelligence modifier.

optionalfeature.name: Advanced Chemistry
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must deal acid, cold, fire, or lightning damage.

optionalfeature.name: Advanced Chemistry
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must deal Acid, Cold, Fire, or Lightning damage.

optionalfeature.name: Advanced Psychiatric Training
entries: You gain resistance to psychic damage, and your mind cannot be read or controlled by any means.

optionalfeature.name: Advanced Psychiatric Training
entries: You gain {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Psychic damage, and your mind cannot be read or controlled by any means.

optionalfeature.name: Alien Breakthrough
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Warlock or Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either deal psychic damage or be from the illusion or enchantment school.

optionalfeature.name: Alien Breakthrough
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Warlock or Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either deal Psychic damage or be from the Illusion or Enchantment school.

optionalfeature.name: Applied Cryogenics
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals cold damage gains the {@condition Frozen|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition (DC equals your spell save DC).

optionalfeature.name: Applied Cryogenics
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals Cold damage gains the {@condition Frozen|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition (DC equals your spell save DC).

optionalfeature.name: Background Check
entries: Choose one additional {@filter Origin feat|feats|category=o}.

optionalfeature.name: Cauterization
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals acid or fire damage gains the Burning (acid or fire, respectively) condition. The burning damage is equal to a number of d6s equal to half the spell's level (rounded down).

optionalfeature.name: Cauterization
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals Acid or Fire damage gains the {@condition Burning|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} (Acid or Fire, respectively) condition. The {@condition Burning|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} damage is equal to a number of d6s equal to half the spell's level (rounded down).

optionalfeature.name: Combat Stim
entries: When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your speed until the end of the turn. Once you use this theory, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

optionalfeature.name: Combat Stim
entries: When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} until the end of the turn. Once you use this Theory, you can't use it again until you move 0 feet on one of your turns.

optionalfeature.name: Constant Evolution
entries: You learn two transmutation spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Constant Evolution
entries: You learn two Transmutation spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Critical Wound Analysis
entries: You have advantage on melee weapon attacks against any creature with the Bloodied condition.

optionalfeature.name: Critical Wound Analysis
entries: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee weapon attacks against any creature with the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

optionalfeature.name: Electroshock Therapy
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals lightning damage gains the {@condition Shocked|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition until the start of your next turn.

optionalfeature.name: Electroshock Therapy
entries: A creature that fails a saving throw against one of your Apothecary spells of 1st level or higher that deals Lightning damage gains the {@condition Shocked|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition until the start of your next turn.

optionalfeature.name: Experimental Reanimation Protocols
entries: You learn two necromancy spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Experimental Reanimation Protocols
entries: You learn two Necromancy spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Hoplology
entries: You gain one fighting style feat of your choice.

optionalfeature.name: Hoplology
entries: You gain one {@filter Fighting Style feat|feats|category=fs} of your choice.

optionalfeature.name: Natural Sciences
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Druid spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either be from the abjuration or evocation school.

optionalfeature.name: Natural Sciences
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Druid spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either be from the Abjuration or Evocation school.

optionalfeature.name: Open Veins
entries: When you score a critical hit with a weapon attack, the target gains the {@condition Bleeding|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition. The bleeding damage equals the weapon's damage die.

optionalfeature.name: Open Veins
entries: When you score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} with a weapon attack, the target gains the {@condition Bleeding|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition. The {@condition Bleeding|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} damage equals the weapon's damage die.

optionalfeature.name: Scalpel Discipline
entries: You can use the mastery properties of one weapon of your choice with which you have proficiency. Whenever you finish a long rest, you can change the weapon you choose.

optionalfeature.name: Scalpel Discipline
entries: You can use the {@variantrule weapon mastery properties|XPHB|mastery properties} of one weapon of your choice with which you have proficiency. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can change the weapon you choose.

optionalfeature.name: Strategic Observation
entries: You can add your Intelligence modifier to your initiative rolls.

optionalfeature.name: Strategic Observation
entries: You can add your Intelligence modifier to your {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} rolls.

optionalfeature.name: Surgically Enhanced Optics
entries: You gain darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, the range increases to 120 feet. This darkvision works in both magical and nonmagical darkness.

optionalfeature.name: Surgically Enhanced Optics
entries: You gain {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} out to a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision|XPHB}, the range increases to 120 feet. This {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} works in both magical and nonmagical darkness.

optionalfeature.name: Threat Analysis
entries: When another creature hits you with a melee attack, you can take a reaction to add your Intelligence modifier to your Armor Class for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss you.

optionalfeature.name: Threat Analysis
entries: When another creature hits you with a melee attack, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to add your Intelligence modifier to your {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB} for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss you.

optionalfeature.name: Toxin Research
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list that deal poison or acid damage. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Toxin Research
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Wizard spell list that deal Poison or Acid damage. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level.

optionalfeature.name: Trappings of Faith
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Cleric spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either deal necrotic or radiant damage.

optionalfeature.name: Trappings of Faith
entries: You learn two spells of your choice from the Cleric spell list. The spells must be of a level you can cast and must be no higher than 5th level. The spells must either deal Necrotic or Radiant damage.

trait.name: Arcane Overcharge
entries: If the Academy Guardian rolls a natural 20 on an attack roll or is hit with a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}, you may choose to cause an {@table Arcane Anomalies|MonstersOfDrakkenheim|Arcane Anomaly}.

action.name: Arcane Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hitYourSpellAttack Bonus equals your spell attack modifier}, reach 5 ft. {@h}{@dice 1d6 + 3} plus your Intelligence modifier Force damage. The Force damage dealt increases by {@dice 1d6} at 10th level and again at 14th level, and its reach increases to 10 feet at 10th level.

spell.name: Radiant Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 2d8} Radiant damage from the attack on a hit. The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} if the target is a Fiend or an Undead.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 2d8|1-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 1.

spell.name: Renewing Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting.
A creature of your choice that you can see within 30 feet of the target regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to {@dice 2d4} plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 2d4|1-9|1d4} for each spell slot level above 1.

spell.name: Reactive Smite

time.condition: which you take when an enemy provokes an opportunity attack from you

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 3d8} Radiant damage from the attack on a hit. The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} if the target is a Fiend or an Undead.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d8|1-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 1.

spell.name: Punishing Smite

time.condition: which you take when an enemy within 5 feet of you deals damage to an ally you can see

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. A creature hit by this attack is pushed 10 feet directly away from you and knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

spell.name: Burning Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 2d8} Fire damage from the attack on a hit and gains the {@condition Burning|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition ({@dice 2d8}). The damage of the {@condition Burning|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} effect increases by {@dice 1d8} if the target is a Fiend or an Undead.
If this attack misses, you regain the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 2d8|2-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 2.

spell.name: Freezing Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 2d8} Cold damage from the attack on a hit and gains the {@condition Frozen|MonstersOfDrakkenheim} condition. The escape DC for this condition is your spellcasting DC.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot

If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 3d8} Radiant damage from the attack on a hit and is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} if the target is a Fiend or an Undead.
If the attack misses, you regain the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot

spell.name: Counter Smite

time.condition: which you take when which you take when you see a creature within 5 feet of yourself casting a spell with Verbal, Somatic, or Material components

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting, and the target must make a Constitution saving throw. If your attack hits, the target makes the saving throw with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} used to cast it is wasted.
If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.

spell.name: Displacing Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 3d8} Force damage from the attack on a hit and is immediately teleported 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d8|3-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 3.

spell.name: Surrounding Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 1d8} Force damage from the attack on a hit. Whether the attack misses or hits, you may teleport a willing creature you can see within 30 feet of you. The target must appear in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of you.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 1d8|3-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 3.

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 5d8} Necrotic damage from the attack on a hit. You regain a number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to twice Necrotic damage dealt.
If the attack misses, you don't expend the spell slot used to cast this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 5d8|4-9|1d8} for each spell slot level above 4.

spell.name: Fortifying Smite

m.text: a weapon with which you have proficiency and that is worth 1+ CP

entries: You make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The target takes an extra {@damage 5d8} Radiant damage from the attack on a hit. The damage increases by {@dice 1d8} if the target is a Fiend or an Undead.
Whether the attack hits or misses, you and up to five allies you can see within 60 feet of you gain {@spell Resistance|XPHB} to all damage until the end of your next turn.
